releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Updates:
## Brand New:
1. icon command: play controller

## Evolvement:
1. Remove setting item: hieght of local graphs (changed to auto adjust)
2. Add setting item: set color for branch's nodes
3. Add setting item: set datetime format

---
# 更新
## 新功能
1. 图标命令：播放控制器

## 优化
1. 移除设置：自定义局部图的高度（改为自动调整）
2. 增加设置：设置分支节点颜色
3. 添加设置：设置日期时间格式

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Demo for "Allow multiple IDs"

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ceefd894-9aed-43ad-bc51-5241500d72a4

---
# Updates:
## Brand New:
1. Node menu: You can add your custom commands to node menu. 
2. Allow multiple IDs: You can duplicate a main note by assigning new IDs to this note(in a specified file property). With this feature, you can add a note to different branch. (Noted: This experimental feature may be redesigned in the future.)

## Evolvement:
1. Main note retrieval: suggest mode "ID order" changed to "ID/Title order"
2. Index graph styles: add 2 toggles
2.1 set same width for siblings
2.2 display created time when mouseenter
---
# 更新
## 新功能
1. 节点菜单：允许添加自定义命令到节点菜单。
2. 允许多ID：可以通过分配新ID（在属性字段）来复制一个节点。这意味着，一个笔记可以添加到不同的分支。（注意：这是一个实验性的功能，将来可能会重构）

## 优化
1. 主笔记检索：顺序检索支持ID顺序或标题顺序
2. 增加两个显示设置
2.1 手足节点同宽
2.2 显示创建时间

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d846ec74-9e11-4dc4-b0ad-375b69540331



# Updates:
## icon toolbar:
- recent retrieval view
- outline view
- table view
- branch growing animation
- all trees
- random index
- random main notes
- export to canvas
- open settings

## node-click events
1. index graph view (same with outline view)
    - click: open file
    - ctrl + click: copy ID
    - shift + click: refresh index graph
    - alt + click: open/refresh local graph view
2. local graph view
    - click: open file
    - ctrl + click: open file in a new tab
    - shift + click: refresh local graph
    - alt + click: open/refresh index graph view
---
# 更新
## 图标命令：
- 最近检索
- 大纲视图
- 表格视图
- 分支生长动画
- 所有树
- 随机关键词
- 随机主笔记
- 导出到白板
- 打开设置

## 节点点击事件：
1. 关键词分支视图（与大纲视图一致）
    - 左键：打开文件
    - ctrl + 左键：复制 ID
    - shift + 左键：刷新关键词分支视图
    - alt + 左键：打开/刷新局部关系视图

2. 局部关系视图
    - 左键：打开文件
    - ctrl + 左键：在新标签页打开文件
    - shift + 左键：刷新局部关系视图
    - alt + 左键：打开/刷新关键词分支视图

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
https://github.com/terrychenzw/obsidian-zettelkasten-navigation/assets/114856910/c815f467-bd30-4c94-8925-095c4e05ef7e


## Brand New:
URI command: you can use URI(file path as parameter) to open zk-index-graph-view. The URI can be generated by file command "Copy zk-navigation URI".  Both main note and keyword index are supported.
examples:
URI for keyword index : [keyword](obsidian://zk-navigation?file=A-Index/MOC.md) 
URI for main note: [main note](obsidian://zk-navigation?file=A-ZK/G203-1BB.md)

## evolvement:
1. new icon command: expand graph(for all local graph)
2. new icon command: export markdown list(for index graph)
3. icon command changed: table view (from customView to customModal)
4. settings:  add "ID order" suggest mode for main note retrieval button.

## bug fix:
1. refreshing bug: mermaid graph disappeared when re-load Obsidian



## 新功能
URI 命令：支持使用URI来打开关键词分支视图。URI链接可以通过文件命令“复制 zk-navigation 链接”产生。支持主笔记URI或关键词URI。例子：
1. 关键词 URI: [关键词](obsidian://zk-navigation?file=A-Index/MOC.md) 
2. 主笔记 URI:  [主笔记](obsidian://zk-navigation?file=A-ZK/G203-1BB.md)

## 优化
1. 新图标命令：放大显示（所有局部关系图）
2. 新图标命令：导出列表（关键词分支图）
3. 更改图标命令：表格视图（由视图改为弹窗）
4. 设置：主笔记检索按钮增加 “顺序查找”

## bug修复
刷新异常：关键词分支图在重启后会消失

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
https://github.com/terrychenzw/obsidian-zettelkasten-navigation/assets/114856910/ee6b6521-606f-4706-a213-a3aba1120de3



## New things:
1. index graph view: main note retrieval button
This new button is available for retriving branch by each main note. It is designed for the people who don't use index files for note retrieving.
2. index graph view: icon toolbar
- icon command for opening settingTab
- icon command for refreshing index graph view by random index
- icon command for refrehing index graph view by random main notes.
- icon command to open table view for branch notes.

3. SettingTab:
- custom created time field for main notes
- toggle for main note retrieval button
- toggle for icon toolbar and each icon command

## 新功能：
1. 关键词分支视图：主笔记检索按钮
这个新按钮允许选择任意一个主笔记来生成分支。它是为那些不使用单独关键词索引文件的用户而设计的。对于已使用关键词索引的用户，也可以当作是一种补充检索方式。
2.关键词分支视图：图标工具栏
- 图标命令1：打开设置
- 图标命令2：随机关键词
- 图标命令3：随机主笔记
- 图标命令3：表格视图
3. 设置页：
- 自定义字段：主笔记创建日期
- 开关：主笔记检索按钮
- 开关：图标工具栏

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 🐞Bugs fix
Below bugs have been fixed: 
- index files under subfolder are invalid
- index-graph-view is not working after swtiching tabs sometimes 
- index-graph-view is not refreshed well when frontmatter changed.


### 🐞Bug 修复
以下 bug 已被修复
- 子文件夹下的关键词无效
- 当切换标签页时，关键词分支视图有时会失效
- 修改属性字段时，关键词分支视图刷新不正确

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
https://github.com/terrychenzw/obsidian-zettelkasten-navigation/assets/114856910/c6a9a6af-2cda-4d68-a37d-fc6c76798fbb



## Changes:
1. Index graph: add branch tabs for multiple branches inside a keyword index
2. Settings: Custom height for index graph
3. Settings: “all file extension” or “.md only” for outlinks graph
4. Commands: "open zk-index-graph" and "open zk-local-graph"

## 变更：
1. 关键词分支视图：当关键词有多个分支时，可以通过点击分支标签切换
2. 设置：允许自定义关键词分支视图的高度
3. 设置：出链视图可以设置 “检索所有类型出链” 或 “仅检索.md类型出链”
4. 命令：增加 “打开关键词分支视图” 和 “打开局部关系试图” 命令

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
changes:
1. svg Pan&Zoom solution changed from d3.js to svg-pan-zoom.js
2. node-link-click options: ctrl+click=> open file in a new tab; click=>open file in the last fileview tab

变更：
1. svg平移与缩放方案由 d3.js 改为 svg-pan-zoom.js （d3.js 太大且复杂，svg-pan-zoom更小而美）
2. 节点单击选项：ctrl+click => 在新tab中打开文件；click=>在最后一个文件tab中打开文件
